name: report_generate
description: Assemble a structured report document from titled sections and save it to the data directory. Supports Markdown and plain-text output. Returns the full report text and optionally saves it as a file. Use as the final step to produce a polished deliverable from prior analysis.

title.description: Report title (displayed as H1 heading in Markdown).

sections.description: Ordered list of sections. Each section has a heading and body content.

content.description: Section body text. May include Markdown formatting.

output_filename.description: Optional filename to save the report (e.g. 'final_report.md'). If omitted, the report is returned in-memory only.

word_count.description: Approximate word count of the report.

file_path.description: Relative path of the saved file, if output_filename was provided. Empty string otherwise.
